layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento Grid Protocol - Mode B for dashboards, Mode A for marketing sections

header.classes: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#050816]/70 border-b border-white/5

elements: React Three Fiber Globe with connection arcs

buttons.primary: bg-cyan-500 hover:bg-cyan-400 text-slate-950 font-bold tracking-wide rounded-full px-8 py-3 transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,194,255,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(0,194,255,0.5)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 hover:border-white/50 text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 transition-colors
buttons.whatsapp_floating: fixed bottom-8 right-8 bg-[#25D366] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(37,211,102,0.4)] hover:scale-110 transition-transform z-50 flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer

cards.classes: bg-white/[0.02] border border-white/5 rounded-2xl backdrop-blur-md hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-cyan-500/30 transition-all duration-300 relative overflow-hidden
cards.effects: Add subtle radial gradient on hover representing tracing beam

motion.animations: Framer Motion for stagger text reveals, card entrances, and parallax backgrounds

sections: Hero (3D Globe + Global Trade Intelligence heading)

features: GST, MSME, FIEO, DGFT compliance tools highlights

images.description: Abstract neon data network for deep tech vibe
Cargo ship from above, perfect for logistics context

testing.data_testid_requirement: All interactive elements, forms, cards, and buttons MUST have a descriptive 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., 'download-app-cta-header', 'country-selector-dropdown').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use react-globe.gl or three.js for the interactive 3D globe on the Home page. Ensure canvas background is transparent.
Typography MUST use 'Cabinet Grotesk' or similar premium alternative for headings, and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body. Do not use Inter or Roboto.
Implement routing for tabs: Home, Customs & Compliance, Trade News, Contact Us, Expo, Product Info.
Include floating WhatsApp button globally across all views.
Contact page must render a Map component targeting coordinates (19.126793986535226, 74.7452378072622).
Data view mockups must look premium, using dark glassmorphic styling (border-white/5, backdrop-blur).
Every page must prominently feature 'Download App' and 'Create Account' CTAs.
